title: cerastium africanum var. schimperi
intro: Cerastium africanum var. schimperi, also known as Mountain Whitlowgrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerastium africanum var. schimperi include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
